scope: Published Enneagram and Enneagram-adjacent mental health posts
selection_rules: Include markdown posts under src/blog with Enneagram or mental-health relevance
Exclude unpublished posts and files missing title/url frontmatter

entries.title: Why MBTI Failed and What to Use Instead
